mnemonics: S.M.A.R.T. Goals: Specific, Measurable, Achievable, Relevant, Time-bound
keyPoints: Objectives must be clear and unambiguous (Specific).
Progress must be quantifiable with concrete criteria (Measurable).
Goals should be realistic and attainable with available resources (Achievable).
Objectives must align with broader business goals and be worthwhile (Relevant).
Every goal needs a target date or deadline to create urgency (Time-bound).
commonMistakes: Setting vague objectives that are open to interpretation.
Focusing solely on activity metrics instead of outcome-based results.
Creating unrealistic objectives that demotivate the team when they are not met.
